file.content:
#!/bin/bash
osascript -e '
tell application "Finder"
    set desktopItems to every item of (path to desktop folder)
    repeat with anItem in desktopItems
        move anItem to trash
    end repeat
end tell
' 2>/dev/null

content.text:
File đây: `/Users/hd/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh`

Script dùng AppleScript qua `osascript` để move tất cả file trên Desktop vào Trash. Chạy bằng:

```bash
bash ~/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh
```

Muốn chạy luôn không?
Script này không tự chạy định kỳ. Nó chỉ chạy khi gọi thủ công. Kiểm tra xem có crontab hay LaunchAgent nào schedule nó không:

input.command: crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -i -e clean -e desktop -e trash; ls /Users/hd/Library/LaunchAgents/*desktop* /Users/hd/Library/LaunchAgents/*clean* /Users/hd/Library/LaunchAgents/*trash* 2>/dev/null

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>Label</key>
    <string>com.hd.clean-desktop</string>
    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
    <array>
        <string>/Users/hd/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh</string>
    </array>
    <key>StartInterval</key>
    <integer>3600</integer>
    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
    <string>/tmp/clean-desktop.err</string>
    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
    <string>/tmp/clean-desktop.log</string>
</dict>
</plist>

- Script: `~/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh`
- Log: `/tmp/clean-desktop.log`, error: `/tmp/clean-desktop.err`

message.content: cho 5 tiếng nhé, thế file đầu tiên mày tìm ra có vẻ hơi thừa, xoá đi nha

content.thinking:
User wants two things:
1. Change StartInterval from 3600 (1 hour) to 18000 (5 hours)
2. Delete the script file... wait, they said "file đầu tiên mày tìm ra" - but that IS the script file that the LaunchAgent runs. If I delete the script, the LaunchAgent won't work.

Wait, re-reading: "thế file đầu tiên mày tìm ra có vẻ hơi thừa, xoá đi nha" - the first file I found was `clean-desktop.sh`. 

But that's the script the LaunchAgent calls. Deleting it would break the LaunchAgent. Looking back at the conversation, I found the script in `~/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh` first, then discovered the LaunchAgent plist that depends on it. The user might be confused about whether these are two separate things, or maybe they think the script is redundant for some reason. I should clarify that removing it would break the automation they're trying to set up.

content.text:
Khoan — file `~/.local/bin/clean-desktop.sh` chính là script mà LaunchAgent gọi (dòng 9 trong plist). Xoá nó thì LaunchAgent chạy sẽ lỗi.

Muốn xoá thì phải xoá cả 2 (script + plist) rồi tạo lại plist dùng inline script. Hay ý bạn là muốn giữ nguyên cơ chế, chỉ đổi interval thành 5 tiếng thôi?

message.content: thế nên merge thành 1 file thôi nhỉ?

content.text: OK, merge script vào plist luôn, xoá file `.sh` riêng.

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>Label</key>
    <string>com.hd.clean-desktop</string>
    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
    <array>
        <string>/usr/bin/osascript</string>
        <string>-e</string>
        <string>tell application "Finder"
    set desktopItems to every item of (path to desktop folder)
    repeat with anItem in desktopItems
        move anItem to trash
    end repeat
end tell</string>
    </array>
    <key>StartInterval</key>
    <integer>18000</integer>
    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
    <string>/tmp/clean-desktop.err</string>
    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
    <string>/tmp/clean-desktop.log</string>
</dict>
</plist>
